Calculations are queued and should start: Izibalo zibekwe emgqeni futhi kufanele ziqale okwesikhashana.
Calculations will start once overlay lay: Izibalo zizoqala uma izendlalelo ezimboziwe sezicutshunguliwe.
Downsampled cells are displayed, roughly: Amaseli athathwe isampula ayaboniswa, cishe alingana negridi yesikwele engu-<2> </2>. Sondeza ukuze ubone amaseli anesisombululo esiphelele.
Finish using the measurement tool before: Qedela ukusebenzisa ithuluzi lokulinganisa ngaphambi kokuqhubeka nokudweba.

Name: Igama
Processing your sketch. This should only: Icubungula umdwebo wakho. Lokhu kufanele kuthathe isikhashana nje.
Results are calculated when a sketch is: Imiphumela ibalwa lapho kudalwa noma kubuyekezwa umdwebo. Ama-polygon angahlukaniswa ukuze kubhekwe ukuwela kwe-antimeridian noma kuhlangane neminye imidwebo eqoqweni.
SeaSketch creates optimized layers for f: I-SeaSketch idala izendlalelo ezilungiselelwe ukucutshungulwa okusheshayo. Lezi zidinga ukukhiqizwa kanye kuphela, noma noma nini lapho isendlalelo somthombo sibuyekezwa.
Select cells where this property is: Khetha amaseli lapho lesi sici sikhona khona
Select one or more options to limit cell: Khetha inketho eyodwa noma ngaphezulu ukuze ukhawulele amaseli kulawo anamanani afanayo. Uma kungekho ukukhetha okwenziwe, lesi sihlungi ngeke sisetshenziswe.
SignInToSketch: Sicela <2>ungene ngemvume</2> noma <6>udale i-akhawunti</6> ukuze uqale ukudala imidwebo.
There was a problem calculating metrics: Kube nenkinga yokubala amamethrikhi aleli khadi.
These metrics are calculated in order to: Lezi zilinganiso zibalwa ukuze kuhlinzekwe izibalo eziwusizo ezifana nokumbozwa kwamaphesenti. Njengezendlalelo ezilungiselelwe, zibalwa kabusha kuphela uma isendlalelo somthombo sibuyekezwa.
